text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
167 
PARENT_ORGANIZATION 
LABEL: 
Plan Parent Organization Name 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the parent organization for the plan, if applicable. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
50 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
text description 
COMMENT: 
This is the name of the parent organization associated with the contract (CONTRACT_ID) and benefit 
package number (PLAN_ID).
